post.subject: I feel like a part of me is missing...
post.body: I lost my phone last night in Aunty Annies. I cant believe it! Ive been phoning it and Aunty Annies all day with no answer from either. I neeeeeed my phone!! Other than that I havent done a lot. Was out with wonderful Rachel and Ronan and Ronan on friday night, home by 9am as i was working at 9am yesterday. After work I went out last night, was quite a good night and had a great curry chip! Then I discovered I'd lost my phone and I just havent felt the same since... On a lighter note the tickets arrived on friday!
